description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, executes the shell commands `mkdir .public`, `cp -r * .public`, and `mv .public public`, then publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact. The job is limited to the `master` branch via an only rule and is intended to deploy to GitLab Pages. No additional services, caches, or variables are defined.
